overview.description: Autonomous AI agents for business process automation and transformation
overview.description_long: SkyLitt (also known as SkyLitt Agentsy) builds autonomous AI agents that function as AI-powered teammates within organizations. Their agents think, learn, collaborate, and act independently to optimize processes across customer care, marketing, media & entertainment, sales, and finance. They offer both custom AI implementation services and a ready-made SaaS product (Lina, an AI translation/localization agent). Focus is on practical, measurable AI rather than theoretical automation.

history.origin_story: Founded in Prague in 2024, focused on making autonomous AI agents practical and accessible for businesses of all sizes.

key_milestones.event: Founded in Prague; launched website and initial AI agent offerings
Listed on CNAIP (Czech National AI Platform)
Launched Lina — AI translation/localization SaaS agent

risk_assessment.agi_displacement_rationale: SkyLitt operates primarily as an AI agent implementation consultancy with a thin SaaS layer (Lina). Their core value proposition — wrapping LLMs into autonomous agents for customer care, marketing, and sales — is highly replicable as foundation model providers (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google) ship native agentic tooling. No proprietary models or unique data moat is apparent.
risk_assessment.market_risk_rationale: AI agents for business automation is a real and growing market with validated demand, but it is intensely competitive with well-funded incumbents (Salesforce, HubSpot, Microsoft Copilot). SkyLitt's focus on mid-market and SME clients in CEE may provide a regional niche, but no clear differentiation beyond implementation services is evident.
risk_assessment.funding_risk_rationale: No known external funding, very small team (estimated 1-10), and the company appears to be bootstrapped in its earliest stage (founded 2024). Without revenue proof or funding runway, survival risk is significant.
risk_assessment.overall_risk_rationale: SkyLitt is a very early-stage bootstrapped AI agent consultancy with no apparent proprietary tech moat, no disclosed funding, and a highly commoditized value proposition. The combination of high AGI displacement risk, nascent market position, and lack of funding creates elevated overall risk.

metadata.notes: Very early-stage Prague startup (est. 2024). Legal entity name on CNAIP is 'SkyLitt Agentsy'. Operates at Velvarská 1699/29, 160 00 Praha. Has two main offerings: (1) custom AI agent implementation services and (2) Lina, a per-seat AI translation/localization SaaS agent. Website is simple static HTML, suggesting micro-team. No leadership or founder names publicly disclosed.
